## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Noboringdesign to discuss content strategy and progress.](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX team (Jenn, Deya, Martha) taking over content generation from Andre; 6 articles live, 4 more coming Friday](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [NBD requested more casual, colloquial tone aligned with brand voice; GrowthX to adjust workflow](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [Agreed to add key takeaways and questions to articles for SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [NBD open to GrowthX's topic selection process; will flag any specific content needs](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
  - [GrowthX to create longer-term performance dashboard for easier reporting to NBD leadership](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions and Roles

  - [Beatriz: General Manager at Noboringdesign (NBD)](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - Makayla: Head of Sales at NBD (not present)
  - [Jenn: Managing Editor at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Deya: Content Manager at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [Martha: New Content Manager at GrowthX (starting)](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Dave: Managing Director at GrowthX (20+ years SEO experience)](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)

### Content Progress and Workflow

  - [6 articles published on March 31st](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [4 more articles scheduled for Friday](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [GrowthX team accessing Webflow CMS and image library](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [NBD has \~30 images in rotation, plans to expand library when bandwidth allows](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue using approved topics in Content OS](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)

### Brand Voice and Content Improvements

  - [NBD previously requested more direct, casual, and colloquial tone](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [GrowthX to review brand voice document and incorporate into workflow](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [Adding short, clear paragraph summaries and key takeaways at end of articles](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Considering including questions in articles or titles for SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)

### SEO and Performance Tracking

  - [Current SEMrush authority score: 18 (baseline for future comparison)](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1218.0)
  - [Positive early signs: growing impressions, improving average position and CTR](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
  - [GrowthX to build comprehensive dashboard for easier long-term tracking](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [Expect more significant results around 2-3 months of consistent posting](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)

### Content Promotion Strategies

  - [NBD open to promoting blog posts on social media](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)
  - [GrowthX recommends focus on LinkedIn and Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
  - [Reddit engagement potentially valuable for LLM (AI) content scraping](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
  - [NBD to incorporate blog promotion into Q2 social media strategy](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to adjust content workflow for more casual, brand-aligned tone](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [Implement key takeaways and strategic questions in future articles](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [GrowthX to create long-term performance dashboard for NBD leadership reporting](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [NBD to consider content promotion strategies on LinkedIn and Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)
  - [Ongoing communication via Slack for any issues or specific content needs](https://fathom.video/share/vDRvmny4szDLxsJKJex_sg4BbsmfDmQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
